components.text:
So Manuals/Techniques are the top of the ice berg when it comes to Cultivation! 

This is extremely important, This is needed in order to cultivate and it also gives you your $(b)$(el:cultinfo/skills)Skills$(/el)$(/b)!

Techniques/Manuals should also be decided in a smart way
Seeing as they give stat bonus if they match your Physique! Different Techniques give different bonuses, Some might be more for a special attribute or dual attributes. Just keep this in mind when deciding!
